version_description:
v1: Global components + fallback updates + finalization improvements

=== Global Components Added ===
- Emergency Detection (ED): agent-level component with global trigger
  - Active emergencies → End Call with compassionate tone
  - Non-active concerns → Back to Normal Flow Split → Reschedule Router
- Transfer To Human (TTH): agent-level component with global trigger
  - Callback accepted → Callback Promise → End Call
  - End call → End Call component → End Call
  - Continue (de-escalated) → Back to Normal Flow Split → Reschedule Router
- End Call: global end node with 3-tier instruction
  - Emergency tone if has_visited_emergency_flow or emergency_exit_reason = end_call
  - Measured tone if emergency_exit_reason = continue
  - Warm tone otherwise

=== Routing Layer ===
- Back to Normal Flow Split: routes to Reschedule Router if prev_node != '', else to Agent Transfer
- Reschedule Router: 8 branches for all RA flow nodes (ra_name through ra_finalization)
- Agent Transfer (node-transfer-back-to-base): unpinned from specific version
- prev_node default changed from 'welcome' to '' (empty)

=== Dynamic Variables ===
- prev_node (default: '')
- has_visited_emergency_flow (default: 'false')
- emergency_exit_reason (default: '')
- has_visited_transfer_to_human_flow (default: 'false')
- tth_exit_reason (default: '')
- transfer_reason (default: '')

=== Fallback Node Updates ===
- Name Fallback: explains name needed to set up appointment + locate in system; no callback/call-back-later offered
- DOB Fallback: explains DOB needed to pull up records + verify identity; no callback/call-back-later offered
- DOB Clarification Fallback: same update as DOB Fallback
- Callback Fallback: explains callback needed to confirm rescheduled appointment; no callback/call-back-later offered

=== Finalization Update ===
- Summary & Confirmation: conversational style, does NOT repeat name or DOB
- Keeps it to 2-3 sentences, weaves details naturally
- Single correction: brief acknowledgment only; 3+ corrections: full re-read

=== Flow Structure ===
- 23 nodes, 12 local components
- 3 global nodes: Emergency Detection, Transfer To Human, End Call

=== Test Results (16 new RA-specific tests) ===
- [Happy Path]: 3/3 pass
- [Fallback]: 3/3 pass
- [Edge Case]: 2/2 pass
- [ED]: 2/2 pass
- [TTH]: 1/2 pass (frustration de-escalation inconsistent)
- [End Call]: 1/1 pass
- [Validation]: 2/2 pass
- [Routing]: 1/1 pass
- Overall: 15/16 pass (94%)
